name: claude-company
description: An AI software company you drop into your repo - hierarchical, hard-gated SDLC for Claude Code
author: redomic

scripts.prepare: node -e "if (process.env.npm_command === 'publish' && !process.env.AUTHORIZED) { console.error('ERROR: direct publishing is not allowed - publish via the release flow with AUTHORIZED=1'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.prepublishOnly: bash tests/cli/test_cli.sh && bash tests/install/test_tui.sh && bash tests/install/run_tests.sh
